_description: Session persistence: captures context at session end, restores at session start

hooks.command: bash -c 'MEMORY_DIR="$HOME/.claude/memory"; mkdir -p "$MEMORY_DIR"; if [ -f "$MEMORY_DIR/last-session.md" ]; then echo "[session] Previous session context found:"; head -30 "$MEMORY_DIR/last-session.md"; echo "---"; fi; if [ -f ".claude/loop-state.md" ]; then echo "[session] Active loop state found:"; cat .claude/loop-state.md; fi'
hooks.description: Load previous session context and active loop state on session start

hooks.command:
bash -c 'MEMORY_DIR="$HOME/.claude/memory"; mkdir -p "$MEMORY_DIR"; TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"); cat > "$MEMORY_DIR/last-session.md" << EOF
# Last Session
**Saved**: $TIMESTAMP
**Working Directory**: $(pwd)
**Git Branch**: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo "not a git repo")
**Recent Files Modified**: $(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | head -10 || echo "none")
**Status**: Session ended normally
EOF
echo "[session] Context saved to $MEMORY_DIR/last-session.md"'

bash -c 'MEMORY_DIR="$HOME/.claude/memory"; mkdir -p "$MEMORY_DIR"; COST_FILE="$MEMORY_DIR/session-costs.jsonl"; if [ -n "$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID" ]; then echo "{\"session\": \"$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID\", \"timestamp\": \"$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")\", \"dir\": \"$(pwd)\"}" >> "$COST_FILE"; fi'
hooks.description: Track session usage for cost analysis

hooks.command: bash -c 'MEMORY_DIR="$HOME/.claude/memory"; mkdir -p "$MEMORY_DIR"; echo "[pre-compact] Saving state before context compaction..."; if [ -f ".claude/loop-state.md" ]; then cp .claude/loop-state.md "$MEMORY_DIR/loop-state-backup.md"; echo "[pre-compact] Loop state backed up."; fi'
hooks.description: Backup loop state before context is compacted
